question: While waiting for the blocked AMD 4xMI350 GBS128/GA comparison run, can existing profiling traces identify root-cause performance gaps versus the Ascend recipe?
short_answer: Yes, as a ranked gap analysis rather than the final same-shape answer. Existing traces say sparse attention is not the main source of the current memory-equivalent e2e gap. The bigger gaps are MoE/MORI owner-rank VJP plus dX-return skew, a large AMD forward/backward wrapper residual, and a visible loss/lm-head path. Sparse attention remains an important kernel target, but the isolated AMD operator is already competitive with or faster than the sampled Ascend operator boundary; the materialized AMD integration still has bridge/scatter variants that can erase that advantage.

blocked_followup.planned_run: AMD 4xMI350 S4096 target-shape GBS128/GA comparison and profile
blocked_followup.blocker: MI350 node currently occupied by an external SGLang Qwen3-32B TP8 workload
blocked_followup.policy: Do not stop external workload without explicit user approval

ascend_existing_best_memory_equivalent.hardware: 8 dual-die Ascend 910C, 16 logical dies, treated by user as roughly memory-equivalent to 4xMI350

amd_current_4x_best_existing.shape: S4096 MBS1 GBS64 GA16 FSDP4/EP4 no activation checkpointing

gap.same_shape_warning: The pending AMD GBS128/GA comparison is still needed. Existing traces compare the best available AMD GBS64 4x run against Ascend GBS128.

isolated_amd_kernel.shape: S4096 layer2 H64 D512 topk512 compressed_groups1024

materialized_amd_paths.read: The isolated AMD query-major kernel is strong, but the integrated query_recompute timing hook is much slower and was demoted in the 4x profile A/B. The explicit materialized path is closer to the Ascend SparseAttnSharedkvGrad boundary but still pays selected-state/scatter stages.

amd_8x_late_profile.read: High-recv ranks run long local VJP tails while low-recv ranks wait in combine_dx. This is owner-rank VJP imbalance plus dX-return wait, not raw MORI combine microkernel cost.

sampled_ascend_moe_ops_from_msprof.read: Ascend uses compact GroupedMatmul plus token permute/unpermute operators. Because Ascend uses 16 logical dies and AMD 4x uses EP4 in the current trace, this is not a strict shape match, but the mechanism gap is clear: AMD owner VJP is still padded/recompute-heavy and skewed.

loss_lm_head_findings.read: Loss/lm-head is visible on both stacks. On AMD it is a secondary optimization target and can distort profiled totals depending on chunk count, but the 8x additive profile says loss is flat across step-2 versus late-step slowdown, so it does not explain the burst decay.

wrapper_residual_findings.read: The late-step slowdown is backward-dominated, but the persistent ~4.6s residual is a separate root-cause bucket. It likely contains FSDP/autograd scheduling, waits, or uninstrumented framework/communication boundaries and needs a same-shape torch-profiler/additive trace.

ranked_root_cause_read: 1. MoE/MORI owner-rank VJP plus dX-return skew is the highest-return trace-backed target. AMD per-call local VJP is tens of ms with large rank skew; Ascend uses compact grouped-matmul/token-permute operators.
2. The persistent AMD forward/backward wrapper residual is large enough to erase isolated kernel wins and must be decomposed with a same-shape profiler run.

3. Sparse attention is still worth optimizing, but the currently isolated AMD SparseAttnSharedkvGrad-style kernel is not the main observed gap versus Ascend. The risk is materialization: active integrated paths still pay explicit scatter or slow query_recompute wrappers.
4. Loss/lm-head is visible and may need sharded/fused vocab-loss work, but current traces do not put it ahead of MoE/skew and wrapper residual.
5. The final AMD GBS128/GA comparison is still required because current AMD profile is GBS64/GA16 while the Ascend local run is GBS128/GA8.
commands_run_for_this_comparison: jq over local AMD and Ascend run_artifacts
ssh ascend-910-dev Python CSV parser over existing op_statistic/op_summary msprof files; no fresh Ascend workload launched
git status --short and experiment README/recipe read before persisting artifact
